$comment: C11/C23 6.7.5 (D-CSUBSET-ALIGNAS-VARIABLE-CODEGEN): an over-aligned (alignas(16)) stack local in a NON-LEAF function with an ODD stack-overflow-arg count (sink9's 9 args overflow oddly on SysV/Win64/AAPCS64) must be 16-byte aligned at runtime. This is the exact case the frame fix (B2) closes — the local base would otherwise be 8-aligned (≡8 mod 16). A runtime address check (&buf & 15 == 0) gates the exit; exit = 42. Red-on-disable: revert computeFrameLayout's localAreaAlignPad and this returns 1. Data-model-independent, one exit code across all four targets incl. the shipped release pipeline.
